text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp begins today, and we'll be training
hard at a campground near the beach while we're
here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the perfect opportunity to polish up Narita
Taishin's abilities before the Kikuka Sho, but...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
It's just... As it is, I already don't get much time to
myself living in the dorms.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
But at summer camp, I have negative alone time,
and that's depressing as hell.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that she mentions it, I can see why this
environment would be stressful for her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It won't do for Narita Taishin to continue this
way, so I start thinking about how to cheer her
up.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, there's seriously no one here. I had no idea
this place existed.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Huh. This might be a decent spot to nap since it's
so quiet.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I was wondering why you were running around
everywhere. Was it just to find a place like this?
choice_data_list: Yep! I was hoping it could help you relax!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Look, I go through this every year, so don't waste
your time stressing out. I can train perfectly well
without you being so extra.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah. Whatever. Just leave it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, don't we have training to do? Are we
gonna get started or not?
choice_data_list: Yes, of course! I'll get everything ready!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
It's so freakin' hard to find the right time to say
thanks...
